record.field: AdGuard Home is a network-wide DNS server that blocks ads, trackers, and malicious domains for every device on your network.

AdGuard Home is a network-wide DNS server that blocks ads, trackers, and malicious domains for every device on your network.

It acts as a DNS sinkhole, re-routing requests to advertising and tracking domains to a "black hole" so they never resolve, protecting browsers, apps, and IoT devices without installing client software on each one. Configured once at the router or DHCP level, it gives a single point of control over filtering, encrypted DNS, and per-client policies, backed by a clean web dashboard with query logs and statistics. It is a strong, modern alternative to Pi-hole for home and small-office networks.

Key features
  • Network-wide blocking of ads, trackers, and malware domains using customizable filter lists and rules
  • Encrypted upstream DNS support: DNS-over-HTTPS, DNS-over-TLS, DNS-over-QUIC, and DNSCrypt
  • Per-client configuration with individual filtering rules and access control
  • Parental controls and enforced Safe Search for major search engines
  • Built-in DHCP server and a web admin interface with query logs and statistics
  • REST API for automation and integration with other tools
Best for

Home labs, families, and small offices that want centralized, network-wide ad and tracker blocking plus private, encrypted DNS, managed from one self-hosted dashboard.

services: adguardhome: image: adguard/adguardhome:latest restart: unless-stopped ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:3000' volumes: - ./adguardhome_work:/opt/adguardhome/work - ./adguardhome_conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
